creator: brix@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

On Oct 10, 2011, at 16:26, Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh wrote:
> What I know about the current status is:
> 1) 4 PRs in the database for xapian 1.2.3 but no one takes them =
currently.
> 2) Repocopy was abandoned.


Not abandoned, postponed. Last consensus was to wait for the package =
builds for FreeBSD 9.0 to get done before mucking about with a new =
default version of xapian* ports.
Unfortunately, FreeBSD 9.0 is still in the works, which is why I have =
not done anything regarding xapian* yet.

I must admit that my spare time for doing FreeBSD-related work is very =
limited these days, so if you (Sunpoet) have better time for following =
this through, I'd be very happy to reassign the responsibility to you.

Regards,
Brix
--=20
Henrik Brix Andersen
